title: 'Shots will be fired': Karoline Leavitt’s pre-dinner comments go viral after White House shooting
summary_full: A shooting scare at the White House Correspondents' Dinner saw President Trump evacuated after a suspect armed with multiple weapons breached a security checkpoint.  Secret Service agents engaged the individual, with one officer sustaining non-critical injuries. The suspect, identified as Cole Tomas Allen, was apprehended. Trump later described the event as an attempted assassination.
